generated_oml:
instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual insight of illumination and occupancy levels for facility managers."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "33D visual insight of building state with sensor overlays for facility managers."
]

instance SimulationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation outcome showing predicted energy consumption under different control strategies."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation to adjust lighting schedules for reduced energy use while preserving occupant comfort."
]

instance ModelProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that BIM geometry and device metadata are ready for twin generation."
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic dimming action executed by lighting actuators based on optimization recommendations.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HonoConnector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware handling MQTT/AMQP ingestion of sensor streams.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DittoStore : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto repository persisting twin state and live data.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMEnricher : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools enriching static geometry with device metadata and performing validation.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelProcessingService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics engine executing simulations on the twin models.",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance EnergyOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine delivering energy‑optimization recommendations and automated actions.",
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Engine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 runtime enabling immersive 3D visualization of the building twin.",
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboards aggregating sensor data.",
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 based immersive 3D visualization of the building twin.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and predictive analytics service operating on twin models.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutcomeInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy‑optimization service delivering recommendations and automated control actions.",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, AdjustLightingAction
]

instance ModelProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering pipeline service applying BIM tools to enrich and validate models.",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelProcessingInsight
]

instance IlluminationStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminationSensor
]

instance OccupancyStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance IlluminationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illumination sensor embedded in the BIM model, captures light level measurements for each space.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminationStream
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor embedded in the BIM model, detects presence of occupants in each zone.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyStream
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor embedded in BIM model, measures temperature and humidity.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalStream
]

instance IlluminationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live illumination measurement values stored in Eclipse Ditto.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminationStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConnector, DittoStore
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live occupancy status values stored in Eclipse Ditto.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConnector, DittoStore
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live temperature and humidity values stored in Eclipse Ditto.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConnector, DittoStore
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting actuator modeled in BIM for building control, capable of dimming and on/off, addressable via the DT runtime."
]

instance BIMGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM geometry and semantic data of the building.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Engine
]

instance DeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched device metadata model generated from BIM.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnricher
]

instance RuntimeControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic model for lighting actuators (dimming, on/off) used at runtime.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine, EnergyOptimizationEngine
]

instance ValidationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model used to validate enriched BIM before generating configurations.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnricher
]

instance BuildingDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains IlluminationSensor, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor,
                LightingActuator,
                HonoConnector, DittoStore, BIMEnricher, SimulationEngine,
                EnergyOptimizationEngine, UnrealEngine5Engine,
                RealTimeMonitoringService, ImmersiveVisualizationService,
                PredictiveSimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService,
                ModelProcessingService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., lighting set‑points, HVAC adjustments) produced by the twin are sent from Ditto through Hono back to the actuators, closing the bidirectional loop."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time synchronization between physical sensors/actuators and the Digital Twin, enabling near‑instantaneous update of the virtual state as new data arrive."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with a central DT framework that integrates BIM‑derived models, Hono/Ditto for bidirectional data exchange, and Unreal Engine for visualization, supporting service‑oriented extensions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the design stage (as‑designed BIM), the deployment stage (model‑driven generation of runtime artifacts), and the operational stage (as‑operated monitoring and control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric is used to quantify the fidelity between the physical building and its digital counterpart; model validation precedes deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Real‑time data exchange is realized through Eclipse Hono for ingesting sensor streams and Eclipse Ditto for managing the twin state and command propagation; the connection relies on the protocols supported by these platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach leverages BIM as the de‑facto AECO standard for geometry and semantics, and adopts open‑source platforms (Eclipse Hono, Eclipse Ditto) that conform to industry‑wide IoT integration practices."
]
